languages.text: "Проктор, отставить! Не вмешивайтесь в процесс священного суда без дозволения. Ваши отчеты были более чем исчерпывающие — данная картина событий составлена на их основе. Показания давать будете по запросу префекта. Вам все ясно?"

"Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"
languages.original_text: "Проктор, отставить! Не вмешивайтесь в процесс священного суда без дозволения. Ваши отчеты были более чем исчерпывающие — данная картина событий составлена на их основе. Показания давать будете по запросу префекта. Вам все ясно?"

"Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

languages.text: "Proktor, zurück! Ihr werdet nicht ohne Erlaubnis in den Fortgang dieses heiligen Verfahrens eingreifen. Eure Berichte waren recht umfassend ... unser Wissen um diese Vorgänge basiert auf ihnen. Ihr werdet Eure Aussage machen, wenn die Präfektin Euch dazu auffordert. Ist das klar?"
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: "Proktor, zurück! Ihr werdet nicht ohne Erlaubnis in den Fortgang dieses heiligen Verfahrens eingreifen. Eure Berichte waren recht umfassend ... unser Wissen um diese Vorgänge basiert auf ihnen. Ihr werdet Eure Aussage machen, wenn die Präfektin Euch dazu auffordert. Ist das klar?"

languages.text: « Il suffit, proctor ! Vous n'interviendrez plus dans les débats de cette cour sacrée sans y avoir été invité. Vos rapports sont des plus complets et c'est sur eux que repose notre compréhension de ces événements. Vous témoignerez quand la préfète l'exigera. C'est bien clair ? »
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: « Il suffit, proctor ! Vous n'interviendrez plus dans les débats de cette cour sacrée sans y avoir été invité. Vos rapports sont des plus complets et c'est sur eux que repose notre compréhension de ces événements. Vous témoignerez quand la préfète l'exigera. C'est bien clair ? »

languages.text: “监察官，立刻退下！在未经允许的情况下，你无权干涉神圣法庭的秩序。你的报告非常全面，我们对上述情况的了解完全基于这份报告的内容。只有行政官要求你作证时，你才可以作证，听明白了吗？”
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: “监察官，立刻退下！在未经允许的情况下，你无权干涉神圣法庭的秩序。你的报告非常全面，我们对上述情况的了解完全基于这份报告的内容。只有行政官要求你作证时，你才可以作证，听明白了吗？”

languages.text: «¡Procurador, vuelva a su asiento! No intervendrá en el proceso de este tribunal sagrado sin permiso. Sus informes fueron muy detallados; nuestra comprensión de estos eventos está basada en ellos. Dará su testimonio cuando lo solicite la prefecta. ¿Está claro?».
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Procurador, vuelva a su asiento! No intervendrá en el proceso de este tribunal sagrado sin permiso. Sus informes fueron muy detallados; nuestra comprensión de estos eventos está basada en ellos. Dará su testimonio cuando lo solicite la prefecta. ¿Está claro?».

languages.text: 「代理人、下がれ！この神聖なる法廷の審理に、許可なく介入することは許されない。君の報告は非常に詳細だった。我々の本件に対する理解はそれに基づいている。総監が要請したときに証言しろ。わかったか？」
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: 「代理人、下がれ！この神聖なる法廷の審理に、許可なく介入することは許されない。君の報告は非常に詳細だった。我々の本件に対する理解はそれに基づいている。総監が要請したときに証言しろ。わかったか？」

languages.text: "Otur yerine Üsteğmen! Kutsal mahkemenin işleyişine söz almadan müdahale edilmeyecek. Sunmuş olduğun raporlar, ziyadesiyle kapsamlıydı. Yaşanan olayları da bu raporlardan hareketle yorumladık. Prefekt sana sorduğu zaman vereceksin ifadeni, anlaşıldı mı?"
languages.original_text: "Proctor, stand down! You will not intervene in the proceedings of this sacred court without permission. Your reports were quite comprehensive — our understanding of these events is founded on them. You will give your testimony when the prefect requests it. Is that clear?"

traits.locale_text: "Otur yerine Üsteğmen! Kutsal mahkemenin işleyişine söz almadan müdahale edilmeyecek. Sunmuş olduğun raporlar, ziyadesiyle kapsamlıydı. Yaşanan olayları da bu raporlardan hareketle yorumladık. Prefekt sana sorduğu zaman vereceksin ifadeni, anlaşıldı mı?"
